pattern: Backtracking places numbers into positions only when the divisibility rule holds, pruning the permutation search to count valid arrangements.
hints: Build the arrangement one position at a time and only try a number when it divides the position or the position divides it.
Filling from position n down to 1 prunes faster because higher positions have fewer valid numbers.
Recurse over positions tracking which numbers are used; at each position try every unused number that satisfies the divisibility condition and sum the completed leaves.

stress.description: fixed n near the upper bound to exercise the search
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    return [min(15, max(1, size))]
